docs.title: NBRJOBS
docs.text: Assignment[Job] Repeating Table

docs.title: Schema
docs.text: Column Type Description Definition NBRJOBS_PIDM NUMBER(8,0) Internal identification number of the employee. NBRJOBS_POSN VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) Position Number. NBBPOSN NBRJOBS_SUFF VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) SUFFIX: Suffix of the job. NBRJOBS_EFFECTIVE_DATE DATE EFFECTIVE DATE: Date that the Job Assignment record becomes effective. NBRJOBS_STATUS VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) STATUS: Status of the job. Valid values are A = Active, B = Leave without pay with benefits, L = Leave without pay without benefits, F = Leave with full pay and benefits, P = Leave with partial pay and benefits, T = Terminated. NBRJOBS_DESC VARCHAR2(120 BYTE) DESCRIPTION: Description of the job. Defaults from the Position Title if left blank. NBRJOBS_ECLS_CODE VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) EMPLOYEE CLASSIFICATION CODE: The employee class on this job. This can tell you whether someone is part time, full time, faculty, retired(90,92), etc. PTRECLS NBRJOBS_PICT_CODE VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) PAY ID CODE: The Pay ID attached to the job. Common values are MN (Monthly) and BW (Biweekly) NBRJOBS_COAS_CODE_TS VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) TIME SHEET CHART OF ACCOUNTS CODE: I've only ever seen this be A. NBRJOBS_ORGN_CODE_TS VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) TIME SHEET ORGANIZATION: Organization where time sheet is sent for this job. FTVORGN NBRJOBS_SAL_TABLE VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) SALARY TABLE: The Salary Table attached to the job. Defaults from the Salary/Rate Rule Form (NTRSALA) via the Position Form (NBAPOSN). NBRJOBS_SAL_GRADE VARCHAR2(5 CHAR) SALARY GRADE: The Salary Grade attached to the job. Defaults from the Salary/Rate Rule Form (NTRSALA) via the Position Form (NBAPOSN). NBRJOBS_SAL_STEP NUMBER(3,0) SALARY STEP: The Salary Step attached to the job. Defaults from the Salary/Rate Rule Form (NTRSALA) or can be entered online. NBRJOBS_APPT_PCT NUMBER(5,2) APPOINTMENT PERCENTAGE: The Appointment percent attached to the Job. Used to establish the percentage of full time appointment for an employee in a position. The value defaults from the position record, but the user may change at the job level. The appointment percent cannot exceed 100. NBRJOBS_FTE NUMBER(6,3) FULL TIME EQUIVALENCY: The full time percentage attached to the job. Defaults to 1. NBRJOBS_HRS_DAY NUMBER(6,2) HOURS PER DAY: The hours attached to the job that are normally worked in a day. NBRJOBS_HRS_PAY NUMBER(6,2) HOURS PER PAY: The hours attached to the job that are normally worked in a pay period. NBRJOBS_SHIFT VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) SHIFT: The shift attached to the job. NBRJOBS_REG_RATE NUMBER(11,6) REGULAR RATE: The regular rate attached to the job. If this field is entered or defaulted from the Salary/Rate Rule Form, the Assign Salary is system calculated and vice versa. NBRJOBS_ASSGN_SALARY NUMBER(11,2) ASSIGNMENT SALARY: The salary to be paid each pay period. If the Assignment Salary is entered, the Annual Salary is calculated based on the factor and vice versa. NBRJOBS_FACTOR NUMBER(3,1) FACTOR: The number of pays per calendar year. NBRJOBS_ANN_SALARY NUMBER(11,2) ANNUAL SALARY: The annual salary attached to the job based on the calendar year. If the Annual Salary is entered, the Assignment Salary is system calculated based the factor and vice versa. NBRJOBS_PER_PAY_SALARY NUMBER(11,2) PER PAY SALARY: Used for deferred pay calculations. NBRJOBS_PAYS NUMBER(3,1) PAYS: Basically pay periods in a year. 12, 26, etc. NBRJOBS_PER_PAY_DEFER_AMT NUMBER(11,2) PER PAY DEFERRED AMOUNT: The amount deferred each pay period for deferred pay calculation. NBRJOBS_ACTIVITY_DATE DATE Date of last activity (insert or update) on the record. NBRJOBS_JCRE_CODE VARCHAR2(5 CHAR) CHANGE REASON CODE: Reason for the job change. A common one is TERM, termination/end of employment. PTRJCRE NBRJOBS_SGRP_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) SALARY GROUP CODE: The Salary Group Code attached to the job. NBRJOBS_EMPR_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) EMPLOYER CODE: The Employer Identification code attached to the job. NBRJOBS_LGCD_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) LONGEVITY CODE: Longevity code attached to the job. NBRJOBS_LOCN_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) LOCATION CODE: EEO location attached to the job. NBRJOBS_SCHL_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) SCHOOL CODE: EEO school attached to the job. NBRJOBS_SUPERVISOR_PIDM NUMBER(8,0) SUPERVISOR PIDM: ID of Supervisor. Almost always empty in our instance. See below queries for a way to pull Supervisor NBRJOBS_SUPERVISOR_POSN VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) SUPERVISOR POSN: The position number of the supervisor attached to the job. NBRJOBS_SUPERVISOR_SUFF VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) SUPERVISOR SUFFIX: Suffix attached to the supervisor's position. NBRJOBS_WKCP_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) WORKER COMPENSATION CODE: Workers' Compensation Classification Code attached to the job. NBRJOBS_JBLN_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) JOB LOCATION CODE: Job Location Code attached to the job. NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE DATE PERSONNEL CHANGE DATE: Date the change was actually made as opposed to the effective date which is for payroll purposes. NBRJOBS_PCAT_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) PREMIUM PAY CODE: Generates premium pay attached to the job. NBRJOBS_DFPR_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) DEFER PAY CODE: The defer pay schedule attached to the job. Defaults from PTRDFPR. NBRJOBS_ENCUMBRANCE_HRS NUMBER(6,2) ENCUMBRANCE HOURS: Hours used to calculate the encumbrance amount for this job in the active fiscal year. NBRJOBS_CONTRACT_NO VARCHAR2(8 CHAR) JOB CONTRACT NUMBER: Job contract number attached to the job. NBRJOBS_STRS_ASSN_CODE VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) STRS ASSIGNMENT CODE: STRS Assignment Code attached to the job. Valid values are STRS mandated. NBRJOBS_STRS_PAY_CODE VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) STRS PAY CODE: STRS Pay Code for the employee attached to the job. The value selected determines how the employee's salary will be reported to STRS administration on the monthly F-496 report. NBRJOBS_PERS_PAY_CODE VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) PERS PAY CODE: PERS Pay Code for the employee attached to the job. The value selected determines how the employee's salary will be reported to PERS administration on the PERS Monthly Contribution Report. NBRJOBS_TIME_ENTRY_METHOD VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) TIME ENTRY METHOD: Time Entry Method attached to the job. Valid values are P = Payroll, W = Web, D = Departmental, T = Third Party. NBRJOBS_TIME_ENTRY_TYPE VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) TIME ENTRY TYPE: Time Entry Type attached to the job. It represents the structure of how time will be entered over the Web or on the Electronic Approvals of Time Entry Form (PHATIME). Valid values areT = Time Sheet, E = Exception Time Only, N = None. NBRJOBS_TIME_IN_OUT_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) TIME IN AND OUT INDICATOR: Time In/Out Indicator attached to the job. Valiod values are Y = Yes and N = No. If Y, this employee must enter time in and out information on the Web or have it entered by a department administrator on the Electronic Approvals of Time Entry Form (PHATIME). Time In and out must be entered for all earn codes that require hours entry. Time in and out will not be entered for earn codes that require units entry. NBRJOBS_LCAT_CODE VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) LEAVE CATEGORY CODE: A code which identifies a group of leave types. It is used when the Leave by Job Method has been selected for leave processing. NBRJOBS_LEAV_REPT_METHOD VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) LEAVE REPORT ENTRY METHOD: Leave Report Method Attached to the job. Valid values are P = None, W = Leave Report on the Web, D = Departmental Leave Report, T = Third Party Leave Report. NBRJOBS_PICT_CODE_LEAV_REPT VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) LEAVE REPORT PAY ID: The Leave Report Pay ID attached to the job and associated with a leave report or leave request. NBRJOBS_USER_ID VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) USER ID: The Oracle ID of the user who changed the record. NBRJOBS_DATA_ORIGIN VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the row. NBRJOBS_SURROGATE_ID NUMBER(19,0) SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key NBRJOBS_VERSION NUMBER(19,0) VERSION: Optimistic lock token. NBRJOBS_VPDI_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code. NBRJOBS_GUID VARCHAR2(36 BYTE) GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration. NBRJOBS_SUPERVISOR_GUID VARCHAR2(36 BYTE) SUPERVISOR GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration. NBRJOBS_PERS_APPT_ID VARCHAR2(10 BYTE) CALPERS APPOINTMENT ID: 10-digit CalPERS ID for this employee which indicates their association with this employer by CalPERS Member Category. NBRJOBS_PERS_PAY_RATE_OVER NUMBER(8,2) CALPERS PAY RATE: Pay rate reported to CalPERS where the derived pay rate must be changed for proper reporting. NBRJOBS_PERS_PAY_RATE_TYPE VARCHAR2(3 BYTE) CALPERS PAY RATE TYPE: CalPERS Pay Rate Type identifies hourly, daily or monthly pay. HRY-Hourly, DLY-Daily, MTY-Monthly. NBRJOBS_PERS_SCHED_DAYS NUMBER(7,2) CALPERS SCHEDULED DAYS: Number of days per week considered full time if the Pay Rate Type is Daily. NBRJOBS_PERS_SCHED_HRS_WEEK NUMBER(6,2) CALPERS SCHEDULED HOURS PER WEEK: Number of hours per week considered full time if the Pay Rate Type is not Daily. NBRJOBS_PERS_SPECIAL_ONLY_IND VARCHAR2(1 BYTE) PERS SPECIAL COMPENSATION ONLY: Indicates this job only includes special compensation earnings and no regular earnings. Special compensation will be reported under the matching/primary PERS XML payroll record. NBRJOBS_SCLS_BASE_HRS NUMBER(6,2) CLASSIFICATION BASE HOURS: Minimum base hours associated to a classification code. NBRJOBS_SCLS_CODE VARCHAR2(2 BYTE) CALSTRS CLASSIFICATION CODE: Code identifies classification used in CalSTRS monthly and supplemental reports of retirement contributions. NBRJOBS_STIN_CODE VARCHAR2(1 BYTE) CALSTRS AB1586 CODE: Code indicates whether an employee has been marked in CalSTRS system as eligible for recalculation of benefits. NBRJOBS_CSST_CODE VARCHAR2(4 BYTE) CALSTRS SERVICE TYPE CODE: California State Teachers Retirement System Service Type Code. Required for CalSTRS Defined Benefit Reporting for both members (DB1) and non-members (DB2). NBRJOBS_CSTB_CODE VARCHAR2(4 BYTE) CALSTRS TIME BASE CODE: California State Teachers Retirement System Time Base Code. Basis of employment associated with the contribution line. NBRJOBS_CSPP_CODE VARCHAR2(4 BYTE) CALSTRS EXPECTED PAY PERIODS CODE: Four digit California State Teachers Retirement System Expected Pay Periods Code used in Defined Benefit Reporting for Defined Benefit Members (DB1) or Defined Benefit Non-members (DB2). NBRJOBS_STRS_FT_BASE_HRS NUMBER(6,2) CALSTRS FULL TIME BASE HOURS: The number of hours required in a school term for full-time. Required for reporting California State Teachers Retirement System Defined Benefit Non-member (DB2) employees performing creditable service. NBRJOBS_STRS_HRS_DAY NUMBER(4,2) CALSTRS WORK HOURS PER DAY: The number of hours required per day in a complete workday for full-time.

docs.title: Most Recent Active Job by PIDM
docs.text:
Find employee's most recent Active, PRIMARY job record in NBRJOBS

most_recent_active_job.sql
-- Most recent Active job by PIDM. 3/25/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    spriden_last_name || ', ' || spriden_first_name employee,
    nbrjobs_ecls_code ecls_code,
    nbrjobs_desc job_desc,
    nbrjobs_status status
FROM
    nbrjobs
    JOIN spriden ON spriden_pidm = nbrjobs_pidm
        AND spriden_change_ind IS NULL
    JOIN nbrbjob ON nbrbjob_pidm = nbrjobs_pidm
        AND nbrbjob_posn = nbrjobs_posn
        AND nbrbjob_contract_type = 'P'  -- Primary Job
WHERE
    nbrjobs_effective_date = 
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            MAX(n2.nbrjobs_effective_date)
        FROM
            nbrjobs n2
        WHERE
            n2.nbrjobs_pidm = nbrjobs.nbrjobs_pidm
            AND n2.nbrjobs_status = 'A'      
    )
    AND nbrjobs_status = 'A'
    AND nbrjobs_pidm = 228479 -- YOUR/employee pidm

docs.title: Job Supervisor by ORGN
docs.text:
Find an ORGN code's supervisor in FTVORGN

supervisor_by_orgn.sql
-- Supervisor by ORGN. 3/25/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    spriden_last_name || ', ' || spriden_first_name manager_name,
    gobtpac_external_user || '@nsuok.edu' manager_email
FROM
    ftvorgn
    JOIN spriden ON spriden_pidm = ftvorgn_fmgr_code_pidm
        AND spriden_change_ind IS NULL
    JOIN gobtpac ON gobtpac_pidm = ftvorgn_fmgr_code_pidm
WHERE
    ftvorgn_orgn_code = 'T60101' -- Enterprise. Replace with your ORGN
    AND ftvorgn_eff_date = 
    (
        SELECT 
            MAX(x.ftvorgn_eff_date)
        FROM
            ftvorgn x
        WHERE
            x.ftvorgn_orgn_code = ftvorgn.ftvorgn_orgn_code
    )-- Only get most recent manager

docs.title: Students that started this semester
docs.text:
This query pulls students whose first semester is equal to the current semester.

students_started_this_semester.sql
-- Students who started this semester. 4/21/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
gobtpac_external_user || '@nsuok.edu' email
FROM
sarappd
JOIN gobtpac ON gobtpac_pidm = sarappd_pidm
WHERE
-- First admitted term
(
SELECT DISTINCT
MIN(s2.sarappd_term_code_entry)
FROM
sarappd s2
WHERE
s2.sarappd_pidm = sarappd.sarappd_pidm
AND s2.sarappd_apdc_code NOT IN ('DN', 'GN', 'PD', 'PW')
) =
-- Current term
(
SELECT DISTINCT
MIN(stvterm_code)
FROM
stvterm
WHERE
stvterm_end_date > sysdate
)
ORDER BY 1 ASC;

docs.text: Column Type Description Definition SFBETRM_PIDM NUMBER(8,0) Internal ID. SFBETRM_TERM_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) Term code associated with this registration. SFBETRM_MHRS_OVER NUMBER(9,3) 'maximum hours' override for this term. SFBETRM_AR_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) identifies the term charges acceptance indicator. SFBETRM_ASSESSMENT_DATE DATE Identifies the date of the assessment for this term. SFBETRM_ADD_DATE DATE identifies the date of the initial registration for this term. docs.title: All 202630 SFBETRM students
docs.text:
Pull all 202630 SFBETRM students that have Enrollment Status of EL

202630_sfbetrm_students.sql
-- All 202630 SFBETRM students
-- 4/14/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    sfbetrm_pidm,
    sfbetrm_term_code,
    spriden_last_name || ', ' || spriden_first_name name,
    sfbetrm_ests_code
FROM
    sfbetrm
    JOIN spriden ON spriden_pidm = sfbetrm_pidm
        AND spriden_change_ind IS NULL
WHERE
    sfbetrm_term_code = '202630'
    AND sfbetrm_ests_code = 'EL';

docs.title: Student Classes By Term
docs.text:
Get each student enrolled for the term and all of their valid classes.

student_classes_by_term.sql
-- 3/2/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    sfrstcr_pidm,
    spriden_last_name || ', ' || spriden_first_name student,
    sfrstcr_crn,
    scbcrse_title,
    sfrstcr_credit_hr,
    sfrstcr_rsts_code,
    stvrsts_desc
FROM
    sfrstcr
    JOIN stvrsts ON stvrsts_code = sfrstcr_rsts_code
    JOIN ssbsect ON ssbsect_crn = sfrstcr_crn
        AND ssbsect_term_code = sfrstcr_term_code
    JOIN scbcrse ON scbcrse_crse_numb = ssbsect_crse_numb
        AND scbcrse_subj_code = ssbsect_subj_code
    JOIN spriden ON spriden_pidm = sfrstcr_pidm
        AND spriden_change_ind IS NULL
WHERE
    sfrstcr_term_code = '202630'
    AND sfrstcr_rsts_code IN ('RE', 'RW')
ORDER BY 2

docs.title: Student Hours By Term
docs.text:
Get each student enrolled for the term and their total hours enrolled.

student_hours_by_term.sql
-- 3/2/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    sfrstcr_pidm,
    spriden_last_name || ', ' || spriden_first_name student,
    SUM(sfrstcr_credit_hr) OVER(PARTITION BY sfrstcr_pidm) sum_enrolled
FROM
    sfrstcr
    JOIN spriden ON spriden_pidm = sfrstcr_pidm
        AND spriden_change_ind IS NULL
WHERE
    sfrstcr_term_code = '202630'
    AND sfrstcr_rsts_code IN ('RE', 'RW')
ORDER BY 2

docs.title: Most Recent Record for Student
docs.text:
Find the most recent SGBSTDN record for each student.

most_recent.sql
-- Get most recent record per student. 2/23/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    sgbstdn_pidm,
    sgbstdn_term_code_eff
FROM
    sgbstdn
WHERE
    -- To get most recent record for student
    sgbstdn_term_code_eff =
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            MAX(s2.sgbstdn_term_code_eff)
        FROM
            sgbstdn s2
        WHERE s2.sgbstdn_pidm = sgbstdn.sgbstdn_pidm -- Join to outer
    )

docs.title: 1st Major, Minor, Concentration for Student
docs.text:
Find the 1st major, minor, and concentration for each student based on the most recent SGBSTDN record.

majr_minor_conc.sql
-- Get 1st major, minor, conc for most recent record per student. 2/23/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    sgbstdn_pidm,
    sgbstdn_term_code_eff,
    sgbstdn_majr_code_1,
    ma_stvmajr.stvmajr_desc,
    sgbstdn_majr_code_minr_1,
    mn_stvmajr.stvmajr_desc,
    sgbstdn_majr_code_conc_1,
    co_stvmajr.stvmajr_desc
FROM
    sgbstdn
    JOIN stvmajr ma_stvmajr ON ma_stvmajr.stvmajr_code = sgbstdn_majr_code_1 -- Majors
    JOIN stvmajr mn_stvmajr ON mn_stvmajr.stvmajr_code = sgbstdn_majr_code_minr_1 -- Minors
    JOIN stvmajr co_stvmajr ON co_stvmajr.stvmajr_code = sgbstdn_majr_code_conc_1 -- Concentrations
WHERE
    -- To get most recent record for student
    sgbstdn_term_code_eff =
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            MAX(s2.sgbstdn_term_code_eff)
        FROM
            sgbstdn s2
        WHERE s2.sgbstdn_pidm = sgbstdn.sgbstdn_pidm -- Join to outer
    )

docs.title: Get Student Graduation Date
docs.text:
Query to get graduation date for a given pidm.

get_grad_date.sql
SELECT
    shrdgmr_pidm,
    shrdgmr_grad_date
FROM
    shrdgmr
WHERE
    shrdgmr_pidm = :pidm

docs.title: Get Graduating Students
docs.text:
Query to get students graduating in a given term.

get_graduating.sql
SELECT
    shrdgmr_pidm,
    shrdgmr_grad_date,
    stvterm_code
FROM
    shrdgmr
JOIN
    stvterm ON shrdgmr_grad_date BETWEEN stvterm_start_date AND stvterm_end_date + 20 -- Leave room for late graduation dates to be entered
WHERE
    stvterm_code = :term_code

docs.title: Most recent PR address
docs.text:
Get the most recent Primary address record for each person in SPRADDR

most_recent_pr_spraddr.sql
-- Most recent PR address record
-- 4/14/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    spriden_last_name || ', ' || spriden_first_name name,
    spraddr_atyp_code,
    spraddr_street_line1,
    spraddr_street_line2,
    spraddr_street_line3,
    spraddr_city,
    spraddr_stat_code,
    spraddr_zip
FROM
    spraddr
    JOIN spriden ON spriden_pidm = spraddr_pidm
        AND spriden_change_ind IS NULL
        AND spriden_entity_ind = 'P'
WHERE
    spraddr_atyp_code = 'PR'
    AND spraddr_seqno = 
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            MAX(s2.spraddr_seqno)
        FROM
            spraddr s2
        WHERE
            s2.spraddr_pidm = spraddr.spraddr_pidm
            AND s2.spraddr_atyp_code = spraddr.spraddr_atyp_code
    )
ORDER BY 1

docs.title: SPRIDEN
docs.text: Name and ID information for all people: students, employees, vendors, etc.

docs.title: Schema
docs.text: Column Type Description SPRIDEN_PIDM NUMBER(8,0) Internal unique identifier for the person/entity. SPRIDEN_ID VARCHAR2(9 CHAR) The Banner ID (e.g., N00112233). SPRIDEN_LAST_NAME VARCHAR2(60 CHAR) Last name of the person. SPRIDEN_FIRST_NAME VARCHAR2(60 CHAR) First name of the person. SPRIDEN_MI VARCHAR2(60 CHAR) Middle name of the person. Can be initial. SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) If null, this row is the most current record. If N, this row is a historic record. SPRIDEN_ENTITY_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) This field identifies if the person is a Person (P), or non-person (C). Non-persons are usually vendors. Filtering on this = P is a good extra insurance step against non-persons in your query if only people are desired. SPRIDEN_ACTIVITY_DATE DATE Activity record on the row. SPRIDEN_USER VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) The user that most recently updated this record. Example: BERRESG SPRIDEN_ORIGIN VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) The name of the data source or Banner Object that was used to update the record. SPRIDEN_SEARCH_LAST_NAME VARCHAR2(60 CHAR) Last name field, but with all non-alphabet characters removed, and capitalized. In essence, UPPER(spriden_last_name). SPRIDEN_SEARCH_FIRST_NAME VARCHAR2(60 CHAR) First name field, but with all non-alphabet characters removed, and capitalized. In essence, UPPER(spriden_first_name). SPRIDEN_SEARCH_MI VARCHAR2(60 CHAR) MI name field, but with all non-alphabet characters removed, and capitalized. In essence, UPPER(spriden_mi). SPRIDEN_SOUNDEX_LAST_NAME CHAR(4 CHAR) Last name field in SOUNDEX phonetic format. SPRIDEN_SOUNDEX_FIRST_NAME CHAR(4 CHAR) First name field in SOUNDEX phonetic format. SPRIDEN_NTYP_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) Name type code, very often blank. SPRIDEN_CREATE_USER VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) Record create user, aka, the user ID which created the new record. SPRIDEN_CREATE_DATE DATE Record create date, aka, the day of creation for the new record. In Oracle-SQL date format (01-JAN-1999). SPRIDEN_DATA_ORIGIN VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) Source of the data. More often than not BANNER. SPRIDEN_CREATE_FDMN_CODE VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) PII domain of the row. Almost always blank in my experience. SPRIDEN_SURNAME_PREFIX VARCHAR2(60 CHAR) Name tag preceding the last name/surname. (Van, Von, Mac, Darth, etc). SPRIDEN_SURROGATE_ID NUMBER(19,0) Immutable unique key for the event of a duplicate PIDM/ID. SPRIDEN_VERSION NUMBER(19,0) Lock token. For my rows, I have a 0 and a 1. SPRIDEN_USER_ID VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) Also, the last user to update this row. Exact same thing as SPRIDEN_USER, just used less. SPRIDEN_VPDI_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) Multi-entity processing code.

docs.title: Students Who are Inelligable to Register
docs.text:
This will grab any student who is no longer able to register for classes.

cant_register.sql
-- Students Who Cannot Register
-- written by Nathan Beene 4/14/26
SELECT
    sgbstdn_pidm,
    spriden_first_name,
    spriden_last_name,
    CASE
        WHEN stvastd_prevent_reg_ind = 'Y' THEN 'N'
        ELSE 'Y'
    END as can_register
FROM
    sgbstdn
LEFT JOIN
    spriden ON spriden_pidm = sgbstdn_pidm
LEFT JOIN
    stvastd ON sgbstdn_astd_code = stvastd_code
WHERE
    spriden_change_ind IS NULL
    AND stvastd_prevent_reg_ind = 'Y'
ORDER BY
    spriden_last_name, spriden_first_name;

docs.title: Find all valid Majors
docs.text:
Find all valid Majors

valid_majors.sql
-- Valid majors. 3/25/26 berresg
SELECT DISTINCT
    stvmajr_code,
    stvmajr_desc
FROM
    stvmajr
WHERE
    stvmajr_valid_major_ind = 'Y' 
ORDER BY 1;

docs.title: STVTERM
docs.text:
Term Code Validation Table

Definition Table

This is a validation/lookup table that defines valid codes for other tables.

docs.title: Schema
docs.text: Column Type Description STVTERM_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) The term code. This is formatted YYYYTT, TT being Term. Understanding term codes: Term codes contain a year, followed by 20, 30, or 10. 20 - Fall, 30 - Spring, 10 - Summer. Spring is the only term whose calendar year matches the year code. For example, 202630 is Spring 2026, 202710 is Summer 2026, and 202720 is Fall 2026. STVTERM_DESC VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) This field specifies the term associated with the term code. The term is identified by the academic year and term number and is formatted YYYYTT. STVTERM_START_DATE DATE This field identifies the term start date and is formatted DD-MON-YY. STVTERM_END_DATE DATE This field identifies the term end date and is fomatted DD-MON-YY. STVTERM_FA_PROC_YR VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) This field identifies the financial aid processing start and end years (e.g. The financial aid processing year 1988 - 1989 is formatted 8889.). STVTERM_ACTIVITY_DATE DATE This field identifies the most recent date a record was created or updated. STVTERM_FA_TERM VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) This field identifies the financial aid award term. STVTERM_FA_PERIOD NUMBER(2,0) This field identifies the financial aid award beginning period. STVTERM_FA_END_PERIOD NUMBER(2,0) This field identifies the financial aid award ending period. STVTERM_ACYR_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) This field is not currently in use. STVTERM_HOUSING_START_DATE DATE Housing Start Date. STVTERM_HOUSING_END_DATE DATE Housing End Date. STVTERM_SYSTEM_REQ_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) System Required Indicator STVTERM_TRMT_CODE VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) Term type for this term. Will default from SHBCGPA_TRMT_CODE. STVTERM_FA_SUMMER_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) SUMMER INDICATOR: Indicates a summer term to financial aid. STVTERM_SURROGATE_ID NUMBER(19,0) SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key STVTERM_VERSION NUMBER(19,0) VERSION: Optimistic lock token. STVTERM_USER_ID VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record. STVTERM_DATA_ORIGIN VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the data. STVTERM_VPDI_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code. STVTERM_GUID VARCHAR2(36 BYTE) GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration. STVTERM_APPORT_CDE VARCHAR2(1 BYTE) APPORTIONMENT CATEGORY: Valid values are (null) = the same as "N", "N" = not reported (skipped on apportionment reports), "1" = first primary term, "2" = second primary term, "3" = third primary term, "I" = intersession term. STVTERM_MIS_TERM_CTG VARCHAR2(1 BYTE) MIS TERM CATALOG: Obsolete; will be dropped from the table at a future date. STVTERM_MIS_TERM_ID VARCHAR2(3 BYTE) MIS TERM INDICATOR: 3-character; user-entered; the field is mandatory when adding new terms or updating existing terms (This entry is used in the majority of the MIS Reports as field GI03 TERM-IDENTIFIER). STVTERM_TERM_LEN_MULT NUMBER(5,2) TERM LENGTH MULTIPLIER: Optional, but required if STVTERM_APPORT_CDE not in ("N",null); 999.99 valid values. STVTERM_TERM_LEN_MULT_IS NUMBER(5,2) TERM LENGTH MULTIPLIER IS: Independent study term length multiplier for apportionment reporting and calculation of FTES. STVTERM_CATALOG_GUID VARCHAR2(36 BYTE) CATALOG GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration.

docs.title: Find current term (Roll forward)
docs.text:
Find current term, rolling forward in intercession (The time between terms)

current_term.sql
-- Current term with roll forward in the event of intercession (between terms).
-- 4/9/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    MIN(stvterm_code)
FROM
    stvterm
WHERE
    stvterm_end_date > sysdate

docs.title: TBRACCD
docs.text: Account Charge/Payment Detail Table

docs.title: Schema
docs.text: Column Type Description Definition TBRACCD_PIDM NUMBER(8,0) Internal Identification Number of the person or non-person account, valid in SPRIDEN. TBRACCD_TRAN_NUMBER NUMBER(8,0) Transaction number (one-up within entity) of the transaction. TBRACCD_TERM_CODE VARCHAR2(6 CHAR) Term associated with the transaction. For student transactions valid in STVTERM, or ARTERM for non-student transactions. TBRACCD_DETAIL_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) Detail code associated with the transaction, valid in TBBDETC. TBBDETC TBRACCD_USER VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) User ID of the cashier who created the transaction. TBRACCD_ENTRY_DATE DATE Entry date and time of the transaction, when initially created. TBRACCD_AMOUNT NUMBER(16,2) Amount of the transaction. TBRACCD_BALANCE NUMBER(16,2) Balance remaining for the transaction, as adjusted by the application of payment process. A negative balance is a credit on the account; a positive balance is a charge. TBRACCD_EFFECTIVE_DATE DATE Effective date of the transaction used to calculate amount due, determine placement on the bill, and control feed to finance system based on Accounts Receivable System Control setting. TBRACCD_BILL_DATE DATE Date that the transaction is billed. TBRACCD_DUE_DATE DATE Due date set when the transaction is billed. TBRACCD_DESC VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) Free-form description associated with the transaction. Default value comes from the Detail Code description (TBBDETC). TBRACCD_RECEIPT_NUMBER NUMBER(8,0) Receipt number associated with the transaction, if generated when the transaction was created. TBRACCD_TRAN_NUMBER_PAID NUMBER(8,0) Transaction Number Paid is used in application of payment to force this transaction to liquidate a specific transaction on the account. TBRACCD_CROSSREF_PIDM NUMBER(8,0) Cross Reference internal identification number. Associates student and third party sponsor (source code C) or student and lender (source code F), valid in SPRIDEN. TBRACCD_CROSSREF_NUMBER NUMBER(8,0) Cross Reference Number for third party transactions (contract number when source code is C), exemption credits (exemption number when source code is E), or deposits released (deposit transaction number when source code is D). TBRACCD_CROSSREF_DETAIL_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) Cross Reference Detail Code for contract or exemption credits calculated based on detail code rules, valid in TBBDETC. TBRACCD_SRCE_CODE VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) Source of the transaction when created on the account, including registration, housing, deposit, user entered, and so on. The default value is user entered transaction (T), valid in TTVSRCE. TBRACCD_ACCT_FEED_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) Status of the transaction in the accounting feed. Valid values are: Y - Feed transaction, F - Transaction fed, N - Do not feed transaction. TBRACCD_ACTIVITY_DATE DATE The last date this row was created or updated. TBRACCD_SESSION_NUMBER NUMBER Cashier session number in which this transaction was posted (0 = current session). TBRACCD_CSHR_END_DATE DATE End date and time of the cashiering session for this transaction. TBRACCD_CRN VARCHAR2(5 CHAR) Course Reference Number (CRN) of the course which generated the charge, when Track by CRN is used in Fee Assessment. TBRACCD_CROSSREF_SRCE_CODE VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) Cross Reference Source for contract or exemption credits, valid in TTVSRCE. TBRACCD_LOC_MDT VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) Location Management Type. Valid values are M for monthly charges, T for term-based charges, or D for daily charges. TBRACCD_LOC_MDT_SEQ NUMBER(2,0) Location Management sequence in which monthly charges were added. Used in subsequent processing to calculate adjustments. TBRACCD_RATE NUMBER(12,6) A per-unit rate used to calculate the amount. Optional for non-student transactions; not allowed for student transactions. TBRACCD_UNITS NUMBER(12,6) Number of Units is multiplied by the specified Rate to calculate the amount. Optional for non-student transactions; not allowed for student transactions. TBRACCD_DOCUMENT_NUMBER VARCHAR2(8 CHAR) Document number that references a source document for the transaction. TBRACCD_TRANS_DATE DATE Transaction date used by the finance system to control posting to the ledgers. TBRACCD_PAYMENT_ID VARCHAR2(20 CHAR) Free-form information identifying a payment; often used to record check or credit card number. TBRACCD_INVOICE_NUMBER VARCHAR2(8 CHAR) Invoice Number identifies a group of charges invoiced via one statement. TBRACCD_STATEMENT_DATE DATE The date a statement was generated. TBRACCD_INV_NUMBER_PAID VARCHAR2(8 CHAR) Invoice Number Paid is used in application of payment to force a payment to liquidate a specific group of charges. TBRACCD_CURR_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) Foreign currency code used when creating a payment, valid in GTVCURR and GURCURR. TBRACCD_EXCHANGE_DIFF NUMBER(16,2) Exchange difference between a foreign currency amount as of the date entered and the value 1) as of the bill date when processed with Invoice Number Paid or 2) as of the charge transaction date when processed with Transaction Number Paid. TBRACCD_FOREIGN_AMOUNT NUMBER(16,2) Amount of the transaction stated in foreign currency. TBRACCD_LATE_DCAT_CODE VARCHAR2(3 CHAR) Category of the late charge detail code, valid in TTVDCAT. TBRACCD_FEED_DATE DATE Date this transaction was fed to the finance system. TBRACCD_FEED_DOC_CODE VARCHAR2(8 CHAR) Document code used to feed this transaction to the finance system. TBRACCD_ATYP_CODE VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) In combination with ATYP_SEQNO, the address where the bill for this transaction will be sent. Required for non-student transactions; not allowed for student transactions. Valid in STVATYP. TBRACCD_ATYP_SEQNO NUMBER(2,0) In combination with ATYP_CODE, the address where the bill for this transaction will be sent. Required for non-student transactions; not allowed for student transactions. Combination valid and active in SPRADDR. TBRACCD_CARD_TYPE_VR VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) Credit Card Type used for Voice Response messages, valid in TTVCCRD. TBRACCD_CARD_EXP_DATE_VR DATE Credit card expiration date supplied at time of credit card payment. TBRACCD_CARD_AUTH_NUMBER_VR VARCHAR2(12 CHAR) Credit card authorization number received when transaction was processed. TBRACCD_CROSSREF_DCAT_CODE VARCHAR2(3 CHAR) Cross Reference Category Code for contract or exemption credits calculated based on category code rules, valid in TTVDCAT. TBRACCD_ORIG_CHG_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) Indicates that the transaction is to be considered as an original charge for the Title IV recalculation process, as opposed to subsequent adjustments due to withdrawal. Valid values are Y (original) or null. TBRACCD_CCRD_CODE VARCHAR2(10 CHAR) Code identifying Credit Card Type used in authorizations via gateway, valid in GTVCCRD. TBRACCD_MERCHANT_ID VARCHAR2(20 CHAR) Merchant ID associated with the Process Name Code, Credit Card Type Code, and System Code. The Merchant ID is included in the credit card payment request transmitted to the vendor handling credit card payments. TBRACCD_TAX_REPT_YEAR NUMBER(4,0) Tax Year in which the transaction was reported on form 1098-T. TBRACCD_TAX_REPT_BOX VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) TAX REPORT BOX: Tax Report Box in which the transaction was reported on form 1098T for tax year prior to 2018 or towards max amount for Payments Received after 2017. Values (CB) Qualified Charges Billed, (AC) Adjustments to Prior Charges. TBRACCD_TAX_AMOUNT NUMBER(16,2) Tax Amount as reported on form 1098-T. Sign relates pay type to report box, and may be pro-rated based on allocation rules. TBRACCD_TAX_FUTURE_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) TAX FUTURE IND: Tax Report Future Indicator is valued with Y if the transaction was reported on form 1098-T as a term beginning in a future tax year for rule CB, or null. TBRACCD_DATA_ORIGIN VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) Source system that last created or updated the data. TBRACCD_CREATE_SOURCE VARCHAR2(30 CHAR) Source system that initially created the record. TBRACCD_CPDT_IND VARCHAR2(1 CHAR) Indicates that contract payment detail is used for application of a payment to contract charges (Y or NULL). TBRACCD_AIDY_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) AID YEAR: The aid year associated with the Financial Aid disbursement. TBRACCD_STSP_KEY_SEQUENCE NUMBER(2,0) STUDY PATH SEQUENCE: Key sequence of the study path for the course registration. TBRACCD_PERIOD VARCHAR2(15 CHAR) PERIOD: The enrollment period code for the.Financial Aid disbursement. TBRACCD_TAX_REPT_BOX_PR VARCHAR2(2 BYTE) TAX REPT BOX PR: Tax Report Box in which the transaction was eligible for reporting on the form 1098T. Values (PR) Qualified Payments Received, (AP) Adjustments to Payments Received. TBRACCD_TAX_REPT_BOX_SG VARCHAR2(2 BYTE) TAX REPT BOX SG: Tax Report Box in which the transaction was reported on the form 1098T. Values (SG) Scholarship or Grant, (AS) Adjustments to Scholarship or Grant. TBRACCD_TAX_FUTURE_IND_PR VARCHAR2(1 BYTE) TAX FUTURE IND PR: Tax Report Future Indicator is valued with Y if the transaction was reported on form 1098-T as a term beginning in a future tax year for rule PR, or null. TBRACCD_TAX_FUTURE_IND_SG VARCHAR2(1 BYTE) TAX FUTURE IND SG: Tax Report Future Indicator is valued with Y if the transaction was reported on form 1098-T as a term beginning in a future tax year for rule SG, or null. TBRACCD_SURROGATE_ID NUMBER(19,0) SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key TBRACCD_VERSION NUMBER(19,0) VERSION: Optimistic lock token. TBRACCD_USER_ID VARCHAR2(30 BYTE) USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record. TBRACCD_VPDI_CODE VARCHAR2(6 BYTE) VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

docs.title: Accounts with a Balance
docs.text:
A query to track if a person in TBBRACD has an outstanding balance, denoted by a negative balance after all transactions are added.

has-balance.sql
-- 202630 Accounts with a balance
-- 4/10/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    tbraccd_pidm,
    SUM(TBRACCD_AMOUNT) OVER(PARTITION BY tbraccd_pidm) balance
FROM
    tbraccd
WHERE
    tbraccd_balance > 0
    AND tbraccd_term_code = '202630'
ORDER BY 2 DESC;

docs.title: WM_SLL_CRSE
docs.text: Custom Watermark table for courses to be sent to System Admin/SLL. SCBCRSE is matched on these courses in the Watermark Courses/Sections/Enrollments files, to only send approved courses into the panel. The Watermark project can be found in GitLab under NSU-ENTERPRISE / Autobot.

docs.title: Schema
docs.text: Column Type Description Definition WM_SLL_CRSE_CRSE_NUMB VARCHAR2(5 CHAR) Subject code for the course. Matches onto scbcrse_subj_code/ssbsect_subj_code WM_SLL_CRSE_SUBJ_CODE VARCHAR2(4 CHAR) Course number for the course. Matches onto scbcrse_crse_numb/ssbsect_crse_numb STVSUBJ WM_SLL_CRSE_COLL_CODE VARCHAR2(2 CHAR) College code. Does not necessarily have to associate with Banner's college code for a course, just want Lisa/Lori/Dr. Keller/Watermark functional users want the course to fall under in Watermark. STVCOLL WM_SLL_CRSE_NODE_NAME VARCHAR2(50 CHAR) Node Name for the course. This just means what hierarchy "node" the course will fall under in Watermark.

docs.title: Watermark Course Import
docs.text:
course_import.sql
-- Watermark Course Import. Pulled 2/24/26 Gabriel Berres
SELECT DISTINCT
    scbcrse_subj_code
    || ' '
    || scbcrse_crse_numb  AS "course_catalog_code",
    scbcrse_title         AS "course_name",
    wm_sll_crse_node_name AS "organization_code",
    scbcrse_subj_code     AS "subject_code",
    scbcrse_crse_numb     AS "course_number",
    ''                    AS "course_description",
    scbcrse_credit_hr_low AS "credits",
    substr(scbcrse_cipc_code, 2, 2) || '.' || substr(scbcrse_cipc_code, 3, 6) AS "Cip_code"
FROM
         (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            scbcrse_subj_code                                       AS w_scbcrse_subj_code,
            scbcrse_crse_numb                                       AS w_scbcrse_crse_numb,
            MAX(scbcrse_eff_term)
            OVER(PARTITION BY scbcrse_subj_code, scbcrse_crse_numb) AS w_scbcrse_eff_term
        FROM
            scbcrse
    ) w_scbcrse
    JOIN scbcrse ON scbcrse_subj_code = w_scbcrse_subj_code
                    AND scbcrse_crse_numb = w_scbcrse_crse_numb
                    AND scbcrse_eff_term = w_scbcrse_eff_term
    JOIN stvdept ON stvdept_code = scbcrse_dept_code
    JOIN nsudev.wm_sll_crse ON wm_sll_crse_crse_numb = scbcrse_crse_numb
                               AND wm_sll_crse_subj_code = scbcrse_subj_code
                               AND wm_sll_crse_coll_code IN ('ED', 'BT', '00')
ORDER BY
    1
